title: Toji and Hikaris Relationship in NME
display_title: Toji and Hikaris Relationship in NME
wikitext:
[]: Toji and Hikari's Relationship in NME [spoilers]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:08 pm Reichu says all the countless tiny details we were previously discussing in the "Interesting Details" thread should get their own topics, so here's one for Toji and Hikari's possibly limerent relationship. Hikari didn't seem to like Toji much in 1.0 , nor did he show any signs of affection toward her. Did we miss something important?

[]:             Quote Post by Gib » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:11 pm What is Pen-Pen doing there??!!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:12 pm This probably doesnt mean anything. Toji was just protecting her because,well,He likes her. Even if Hikari doesnt like him,this kinda proves that Toji likes her because he was willing to protect her regardless of her liking him or not. And also,what was Pen Pen doing there?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:12 pm Lol, it would be kind of funny to see the tables turned around this time. Though, i doubt that "OMG I HELD YOU WHILE THERE WERE EXPLOSIONS, BE MY GIIIRL, are you gonna be my GURL." is much of anything intimate. So far, they just seem like 'pals' around the school. So, we did not miss anything important. That would require for something to take place, and nothing is indicative of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:15 pm Remember that Touji's a pretty old-fashioned guy, as noted in the field trip lunch scene. Could be gentleman chivalry at worst.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:15 pm Gib wrote: What is Pen-Pen doing there??!!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 04, 2010 6:07 pm 1.XX DOES have this shot: so I'm guessing NME is possibly implying that Toji/Hikari have something going on that they (sadly) didn't in NGE. (Also, for whatever it's worth, Hikari and Toji both admit to liking each other in Hikari's Best End in Eva2 PSP version.)

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jun 04, 2010 6:11 pm probably not much to say on this topic.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Fri Jun 04, 2010 7:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: 1.XX DOES have this shot: so I'm guessing NME is possibly implying that Toji/Hikari have something going on that they (sadly) didn't in NGE. (Also, for whatever it's worth, Hikari and Toji both admit to liking each other in Hikari's Best End in Eva2 PSP version.)

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 04, 2010 8:03 pm Eh, I can see it as her staring longingly at Toji. I don't believe anything special is going on between them though.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:12 am bladerj wrote: That shot means nothing, she is a class rep, the students under her guidance are away from the pack, she is just overwatching them.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:36 am It's a cute relationship that sadly didn't get of the ground in NGE, I dont think it will here ether.

[]:             Quote Post by Adamski » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:17 am Seeing as one of the main objectives of Rebuild is to make the series more accessible and less confusing, they had to make some decisions of what to leave out. Toji and Hikari's relationship wasn't so important in the grand scheme of things, and doesn't need so much screen time in this version. Still, their crush has been pretty well established and there's no saying it might not get more attention in the next movie, or not. The reason Pen Pen is there is simply because he is obviously the best character in the entire series. Certainly the most well adjusted and mentally stable character out of the series. The most likable character and a true neutral. He needs as much screen time as he can get.

[]:             Quote Post by Lui » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:32 am Oh damn I thought that was his sister and they were evacuating.. And I watched the film 3 times already.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sat Jun 05, 2010 9:05 am Same here...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jun 05, 2010 4:13 pm Adamski wrote: Seeing as one of the main objectives of Rebuild is to make the series more accessible and less confusing

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Sat Jun 05, 2010 4:32 pm I think part of the Rebuild series relies on what the fans already know, only showing whats diferent and very little re enforcing of the rest. I'd guess that their relationship is the same as in the series, just not shown as much since the fans already know how things are. That's just a guess, though.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jun 05, 2010 4:49 pm Adamski wrote: Seeing as one of the main objectives of Rebuild is to make the series more accessible and less confusing, they had to make some decisions of what to leave out.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:16 am the_seventh_child wrote: Actually, a new fan that has watched only 1.0+2.0, might get more confused, exactly because they have left a few parts out. We are talking from a given standpoint and we know what a few things are supposed to mean by default. A new fan might have difficulty knowing what 'berserk' might be or about syncro-shit and etc.etc. The main plot, might be considered more accessible, but tech stuff, pheew, a person newly introduced will have a few probs figuring it out.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Jun 06, 2010 7:15 am slothen wrote: his point still stands, the hikari-touji relationship is fairly unimportant in the grand scheme of things.
